      "text": "6. Un Waraiis fazzija : Ais-

"

iptes-Semmes Wezzajee.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "8. Un wiﬀa Jahsepa Saine/

winno Lohpus pamette tee Go-
a Semmê.
"

    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "9. Un ar winnu aisgahje tik

"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "10. Kad tee nu us to Klohnnu

enas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "11. Kad tahs Semmes Lau-
/ tee Kananiteri / to Noscheh-
nu pee to Klohnnu Atad redse-
tad fazzija tee: Teem Egip-
eem tur irr weena gruhta No-
hloſchana / tadeht tappe wiꞥ-
Wahrds nofanets to Egipte-
Noschehlums/ kas gull winna
fs Jardanas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "12. Un winna Dehli darrija
raam/ itt ka wiꞥſch teem bij
wehlejis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "13. Jo winna Dehli wedde
to uhs Kanââna Semmi/ un up-
rakke to eekſch tahs dwkahrtigas
Bedres/ ko Ahbrâains ar to Tih-
rumu bij pirzis par weenu ihpa-
fchu Kappu/ no Eewrona/ ta Ge-
titera prett Mamre.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "14. Pehz to atgreesahs Jah-
seps uhs Egipti / wiꞥſch / un
winna Brahti/ un wiﬀi/ kas ar
winnu bij aisgahjuſchi winna
Tehwu apraſt/ pehz ts / kad
wiꞥſch fawn Tehwu jaw bij pa-
glabbojis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "15. Kad mi Jahsepa Brahti-
redseja winna Tehwu effam no-
mirruſchnu / tad fazzija tee : Ju-
fchu Jahseps muhs eenihdehs/ un
atmaſfahs mums wiﬀu to Lan-
numu / ko mehs winnam effam
padarrijuſchi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "16. Tad likke tee Jahsepam
fazziht : Taws Tehws pawehleja/
pirms ka tas nomirre/ un fazzija:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "17. Ta buhs jums Jahsepam
fazziht/ Peedohdi/ luhsams/ ta-
wo Brahto Noseegumu/ un wiꞥ-
no Grehkus/ jo tee irr tew tau-
nu padarrijutchi/ bet nu peedoh-
di/ luhsams/ to Noseegumu/ ta-
wa Tehwa Deewa Kalpeem/ un
Jahseps raudaja / kad tee ta us
winnu runnaja.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "18. Tad nahze arridsan wiꞥ-
na Brahti/ un mettehs preeſch

dsi/ mehs effam tawi Kalpt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "19. Un Jahseps fazzija us
